stats.title: Trusted by Thousands
stats.subtitle: We've helped patients from around the world access world-class medical care in Saudi Arabia.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting your medical treatment in Saudi Arabia is simple. Follow these steps.

step1.title: Upload Your Reports
step1.description: Upload your medical reports, test results, or diagnostic images. Our AI analyzes them instantly.

step2.title: Get AI Recommendations
step2.description: Receive personalized recommendations for the best specialty and facilities matching your case.

step3.title: Compare & Choose
step3.description: Browse facilities, compare treatment packages, prices, and doctor credentials.

step4.title: Book Your Treatment
step4.description: Schedule your appointment and let us handle travel logistics from visa to recovery.

testimonials.title: What Patients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from patients who transformed their health journey with Wisal.

items.name: Ahmed Hassan
items.text: The AI triage was incredible. Within hours of uploading my reports, I had a clear treatment plan and the best facility recommendations. The entire process was transparent and professional.

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.text: Wisal made everything so easy. From the initial consultation to post-treatment follow-up, I felt supported every step. The facility was world-class and the cost was a fraction of what I'd pay back home.

items.name: Mohammed Ali
items.text: As someone with complex medical needs, I was nervous about seeking treatment abroad. Wisal's AI matching found exactly what I needed. The travel coordination was flawless.

items.question: How does the AI triage work?
items.answer: Our AI-powered system analyzes your uploaded medical reports and documents. It identifies your condition, suggests the appropriate medical specialty, and recommends the best facilities in Saudi Arabia based on your specific case.

items.question: Is my medical information secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade encryption and comply with international healthcare data protection standards. Your medical information is never shared without your explicit consent.

items.question: How much does treatment cost in Saudi Arabia?
items.answer: Treatment costs in Saudi Arabia are significantly lower than in Western countries—often 50-70% less for the same quality of care. We help you compare packages across facilities to find options that fit your budget.

items.question: Do you help with travel arrangements?
items.answer: Yes! We offer comprehensive travel coordination including visa processing, flight bookings, airport pickup, and hotel accommodation near your chosen facility. We make your medical journey stress-free.

items.question: Can I communicate in my language?
items.answer: Our AI assistant supports multiple languages including Arabic, English, and more. We also provide translation services during consultations and can arrange multilingual coordinators at your facility.

items.question: What happens after I return home?
items.answer: We provide post-treatment follow-up care coordination, including medication reminders, rehabilitation schedules, and remote consultations with your Saudi doctors to ensure continuous recovery support.

footer.tagline: Your AI-powered gateway to medical tourism in Saudi Arabia. Connecting patients with world-class care.

about.subtitle: Our Philosophy
about.heading: Your Health,
about.p1: At Wisal, we believe world-class healthcare should know no borders. We bridge the gap between international patients and Saudi Arabia’s finest medical facilities.
about.p2: From AI-powered triage to comprehensive travel coordination, our platform guides you through every step of your medical journey — from first inquiry to full recovery.

services.subtitle: Our Services
services.heading: Everything You
services.desc: Five integrated modules working together to turn your medical inquiry into a successful treatment journey.

newsletter.title: Stay
newsletter.desc: Receive healthcare insights, updates on Saudi medical tourism, and exclusive offers.
newsletter.toast: Welcome! We'll keep you updated on the latest in medical tourism.

about.title: About Us
about.p1: Wisal is your trusted platform for medical tourism in Al-Ahsa, Saudi Arabia. We connect international patients with world-class healthcare facilities, making the journey from consultation to recovery seamless and stress-free.
about.p2: Our AI-powered platform analyzes medical reports, recommends the right specialists and facilities, and coordinates every aspect of your medical trip — from visa arrangements to post-treatment follow-up.
about.p3: We are committed to transparency, quality, and compassionate care. Every facility in our network is verified and licensed, ensuring you receive the highest standard of treatment.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Wisal was born from a simple vision: to make world-class healthcare accessible to everyone, regardless of borders. We saw a gap between patients seeking quality treatment abroad and the excellent medical facilities in Saudi Arabia waiting to serve them.
story.p2: Built by a team of healthcare and technology professionals, our platform leverages artificial intelligence to bridge this gap. What started as an idea to simplify medical referrals has grown into a comprehensive medical tourism ecosystem.
story.p3: Today, Wisal serves patients from over 50 countries, partnering with leading hospitals in Al-Ahsa to deliver personalized, end-to-end medical journeys.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: Have questions or need assistance? We’re here to help. Reach out to our team and we’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: At Wisal, we take your privacy seriously. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our platform.
privacy.p2: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and medical reports. This data is used solely to facilitate your medical tourism journey and improve our services.
privacy.p3: Your medical information is encrypted and stored securely. We never share your data with third parties without your explicit consent. We comply with international healthcare data protection standards.
privacy.p4: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. Contact us if you have any questions about our privacy practices.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: By using Wisal’s platform, you agree to these terms. Our platform connects patients with medical facilities; we facilitate introductions and coordination but do not provide medical services directly.
terms.p2: All medical decisions should be made in consultation with licensed healthcare professionals. Wisal is not responsible for the quality of medical treatment provided by partner facilities.
terms.p3: You agree to provide accurate information when using our services. Misrepresentation may result in termination of access. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time.
terms.p4: For questions about these terms, please contact us. Use of this platform constitutes acceptance of these terms.
